requirement.title: Inline the dashboard SPA into a single self-contained HTML
requirement.description: Vercel/Next.js returns 404 for every path under /dashboard/ except the auto-served index.html, including .css and flat-path .js. Diagnostic probes confirmed; build log confirmed files are deployed. Stop relying on multiple files: inline compiled JS + styles into one HTML response.

triage.notes: Third attempt to unblock the same blank-screen failure (ADR-011, 012, 013). Inlining sidesteps the unresolved Vercel routing question.

orchestrator.summary: Build inlines 116KB HTML containing full SPA; local smoke test confirms /dashboard/ returns 200 with DashboardPage embedded; rewrite rule makes /dashboard/ map to index.html on both dev and prod.
